rationale: Feature cycle: PS1/N64 retro visual system. Creator feedback (q-20260412-004) explicitly requested N64/PS1 pixelated look with volumetric effects. Existing CRT terminal shader creates green phosphor look, not retro console. New PSX shader adds resolution pixelation, 15-bit color banding, warm earth tints per biome, day/night auto-tinting. Replaces CRT as default render mode.
next_cycle_plan: Bug hunt on cycle 7 files (retro_psx_post.gdshader, screen_dither_layer.gd, broceliande_forest_3d.gd, merlin_visual.gd). Then: PROTECT effect implementation or core loop playtest.
